points.id: Bertindak sebagai konseptor utama kurikulum orientasi, memastikan semua program selaras dengan nilai akademik dan organisasi.
points.en: Served as the lead conceptualizer for the orientation curriculum, ensuring all programs aligned with academic and organizational values.

points.id: Memimpin operasi lapangan sebagai Koordinator Lapangan, mengelola eksekusi program dan memastikan keamanan serta kedisiplinan seluruh peserta.
points.en: Directed field operations as Field Coordinator, managing program execution and ensuring safety/discipline for all participants.

points.id: Memimpin tim panitia berjumlah 40+ orang untuk menyelenggarakan acara olahraga dengan 258+ peserta.
points.en: Led a team of 40+ committee members to organize a sports event with 258+ participants.

points.id: Mengelola operasional acara end-to-end, termasuk perencanaan strategis, alokasi anggaran, dan koordinasi antar departemen.
points.en: Managed end-to-end event operations, including strategic planning, budget allocation, and cross-departmental coordination.

points.id: Memberikan bimbingan dan arahan kepada mahasiswa baru, memfasilitasi transisi mereka ke dalam budaya organisasi kampus dan mengembangkan soft skills.
points.en: Provided mentorship and guidance to new students, facilitating their transition into the campus organizational culture and developing soft skills.

institution.en: Electronic Engineering Polytechnic Institute of Surabaya (EEPIS)

points.id: Fokus pada Rekayasa Perangkat Lunak, Struktur Data, dan Arsitektur Cloud.
points.en: Focus on Software Engineering, Data Structures, and Cloud Architecture.
Actively participating in the Student Association (HIMIT).

points.id: Mendapatkan lencana Cloud Foundations, menunjukkan pengetahuan fundamental dalam komputasi awan, layanan inti AWS, keamanan, dan arsitektur.
points.en: Awarded the Cloud Foundations Training Badge, demonstrating foundational knowledge in cloud computing concepts, AWS core services, security, and architecture.

points.id: Program pengembangan mobile lanjutan berfokus pada pembuatan aplikasi lintas platform berperforma tinggi.
points.en: An advanced mobile development program focusing on building high-performance, cross-platform applications.
